This '''unidentified Wookiee rebel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who was recruited by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Col Serra]] to join [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliances]]' new elite fighting unit, [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]]. During the [[Battle of Sullust (4 ABY)|Second Battle of Sullust]] he was killed alone with a [[Unidentified Rebel Vanguard (Second Battle of Sullust)|Rebel Vanguard]] when [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88]] jumped out of a [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|Sentinel-class landing craft]] and landed nearby. The [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] then shot both rebels several times before they died.

{{Char-stub}}
